summary: This is a minimal announcement post where Joel Spolsky promotes an upcoming live television appearance on TechTV's The Screen Savers show. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a brief promotional notice to his blog readers. It directs readers to tune in on Friday at 7 p.m. Eastern time.
key_points: Joel was appearing on TechTV's The Screen Savers, a popular tech-focused cable TV show of the early 2000s
The post reflects the era when tech bloggers were crossing over into television media
key_insight: This is a brief promotional announcement with no substantive content to analyze.
